review_text: Exactly as described. Happy with the purchase.
Packaging was slightly damaged, but item inside was fine.
The quality is amazing. Worth every yen.

Arrived earlier than expected. Great service!
Recommend to anyone looking for this.
Happy with the purchase. Would order again.
